name: character-bible
description: Character tracking and consistency management. Build detailed character profiles with arcs, relationships, contradictions, and growth trajectories. Never lose track of eye color, backstory details, or where a character was last Tuesday.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: char:profile
commands.description: View or update a character's full profile

commands.name: char:arc
commands.description: Set or update a character's arc: lie, wound, want, need

commands.name: char:relate
commands.description: Create or update a relationship between two characters

commands.name: char:scene
commands.description: Record a character's state/behavior in a specific scene for continuity tracking
commands.example: char:scene "Maren" "ch4" "Confronts Hale, hands shaking, speaks in short clipped sentences"

commands.name: char:check
commands.description: Check a character's profile for consistency issues or gaps

commands.name: char:cast
commands.description: List all characters in the current project with their roles

commands.name: char:map
commands.description: Show the relationship map for the current project
